DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.6: Go back to D-pos after calibration (06h)
lists.7: The time of a fail control (07h)

lists.4: Turning on look learning (the time of a driven early stage) (04h)

Highest SCU temperature recorded.comment: Highest ECU temperature recorded since the SCU has been mounted in the car

Highest actuator temperature recorded.comment: Highest motor temperature recorded since the SCU has been mounted in the car

IGN ON counter.comment: IGN number counted since the SCU has been mounted in the car. Incremented by one at IGN OFF -> ON

Learning counter.comment: The number of wall learning counter

Target shift position counter.comment: Counter that represents the target shift position (eg: 0-30 = P, 31-50 = N, etc.)

SCU_GearboxPositionTarget.comment: Gearbox position target transmitted by SCU

Shifter position read by SCU.comment: Shifter position following driver's operation (SCU input)

Current shift position counter.comment: Counter that represents the current shift position (eg: 0-30 = P, 31-50 = N, etc.)

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

lists.4: Reducing agent temperatures at tank condition
lists.5: Exhaust gaz temperature upstream catalyst condition

lists.4: Regular pressure build up not ok
